title: LAMP in situ complete
author: Nicholas W. West
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.57cg9iw
materials: Can be held overnight in paraffin
For colorimeteric detection add 0.15 µL of digoxigenin-11-dUTP, 25nmol (25uL) from Roche, this replaces a portion of the H2O in the reaction mix
For fluorescent detection procced to step 43

steps.title: Harvest tissue and submerge in an...
steps.instruction: Harvest tissue and submerge in an excess of FAA solution, pull a vacuum for ~2 min and agitate samples gently. Hold under vacuum for 2-3 min before slowly releasing vacuum. Once the vacuum is released the samples should sink, if tissue samples float to the surface, agitate gently and repeat vacuum step if necessary.

steps.title: 2 washes in 50% EtOH, 5 min per wash
steps.instruction: 2 washes in 50% EtOH, 5 min per wash

steps.title: Incubate samples at 4 °C for 10 to 14 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 4 °C for 10 to 14 hours

steps.title: 2 washes in 50% EtOH, 30 min per wash
steps.instruction: 2 washes in 50% EtOH, 30 min per wash

steps.title: Incubate 10 min in 75% EtOH at 60 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min in 75% EtOH at 60 °C

steps.title: Can be held in 75% EtOH overnight at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Can be held in 75% EtOH overnight at 4 °C

steps.title: Incubate 10 min 85% EtOH at 60 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min 85% EtOH at 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate 10 min 95% EtOH at 60 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min 95% EtOH at 60 °C

steps.title: 2 washes in 100% EtOH, 10...
steps.instruction: 2 washes in 100% EtOH, 10 min per wash at 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate 10 min 3:1 EtOH (100%)...
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min 3:1 EtOH (100%) : Histoclear (or xylenes) at 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate 10 min 1:1 EtOH (100%)...
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min 1:1 EtOH (100%) : Histoclear (or xylenes) at 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate 10 min 1:3 EtOH (100%)...
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min 1:3 EtOH (100%) : Histoclear (or xylenes) at 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate 5 min Histoclear (or xylenes) at 60 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate 5 min Histoclear (or xylenes) at 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate 10 min 1:1 Histoclear (or...
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min 1:1 Histoclear (or xylenes) : Paraffin at 60 °C

steps.title: 5 washes in paraffin at 60...
steps.instruction: 5 washes in paraffin at 60 °C 30 min per wash

steps.title: Place tissue molds and tweezers/tools in...
steps.instruction: Place tissue molds and tweezers/tools in oven (or preffered heating element)

steps.title: Transfer tissue into pre-warmed tissue molds,...
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue into pre-warmed tissue molds, fill molds with paraffin and align samples into desired orientation. Wait for bubbles to disperse, accelerate dispersal with gentle agitation if desired. Remove molds from oven and allow to cool

steps.title: Tissue sectionsing is a skill and...
steps.instruction: Tissue sectionsing is a skill and a well angeled and extremely sharp blade is critical. An excellent guide to the technique can be found within "Plant Mircotechnique and Microscopy" by Steven Ruzin 1999

steps.title: Use the initial sections to adjust...
steps.instruction: Use the initial sections to adjust the microtome such that sections ribbon together. When approaching the perceived area of interest reduce the number of sections per slide. Float section ribbon on 45 °C diH2O, capture on slide leaving a wide margin around sample.

steps.title: Incubate slides in Histoclear (or xylenes)...
steps.instruction: Incubate slides in Histoclear (or xylenes) for 10 min at 55 °C

steps.title: 3 washes of Histoclear (or xylenes)...
steps.instruction: 3 washes of Histoclear (or xylenes) at 55 °C for 5 min per wash

steps.title: 3 washes of 100% EtOH at...
steps.instruction: 3 washes of 100% EtOH at 55 °C for 2 min per wash

steps.title: Incubate 2 min in 95% EtOH
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 min in 95% EtOH

steps.title: Incubate 2 min in 70% EtOH
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 min in 70% EtOH

steps.title: Incubate 2 min in 50% EtOH
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 min in 50% EtOH

steps.title: Incubate 2 min in DEPC H2O
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 min in DEPC H2O

steps.title: Incubate 2 min in 1xTBS
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 min in 1xTBS

steps.title: Prepare Proteinase K buffer (1xTE, 0
steps.instruction: Prepare Proteinase K buffer (1xTE, 0.5% Triton-x-100, 20ug/uL Proteinase K), vortex before adding Proteinase K.

steps.title: Remove slide, drain excess buffer, and...
steps.instruction: Remove slide, drain excess buffer, and outline tissue with hydrophobic pen/wax pencil

steps.title: Add 250 µL Proteinase K buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL Proteinase K buffer to each slide and place in humidity chamber at 37 °C for 20 min

steps.title: Wash 3 times with 1xTBS for 5 min per wash
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times with 1xTBS for 5 min per wash

steps.title: Detecting DNA
steps.instruction: Detecting DNA? Proceed to LAMP Reaction Detecting RNA? Remove genomic background first

steps.title: Prepare a 40 µL DNase I...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 40 µL DNase I reaction per slide according to manufacturers (Thermo Scientific) instructions

steps.title: Apply DNase I reaction mix drop-wise...
steps.instruction: Apply DNase I reaction mix drop-wise onto tissue sections, pitch and roll slide to ensure the reaction covers all tissue samples. Place slide into humidity chamber and incubate at 37 °C for 1 hour

steps.title: To prevent the reaction mix from...
steps.instruction: To prevent the reaction mix from pooling and encourage more uniform coverage of tissue samples, every 5-7 min gently pitch and roll the humidity chamber

steps.title: Wash 3 times in 1xTBS, 5...
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times in 1xTBS, 5 min per wash, proceed to LAMP reaction

steps.title: Prepare a 30 µL LAMP reaction...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 30 µL LAMP reaction per slide as outlined in the manufacturers (New England Biosciences) instructions.

steps.title: Apply desired LAMP reaction (colorimeteric or...
steps.instruction: Apply desired LAMP reaction (colorimeteric or fluorescent) mix drop-wise to the tissue samples, pitch and roll the slide to encourage uniform distribution. Place in humidity chamber and incubate for an empirically determined amount of time, typically between 30 min to 1 hour

steps.title: To avoid pooling and encourage even...
steps.instruction: To avoid pooling and encourage even distribution of the reaction mix, every 5-7 min gently pitch and roll the humidity chamber for the duration of incubation

steps.title: 2 washes in 1xMAB, 5 min...
steps.instruction: 2 washes in 1xMAB, 5 min per wash, proceed to detection

steps.title: Incubate slides in 1xBlocking buffer with...
steps.instruction: Incubate slides in 1xBlocking buffer with gentle rocking at room temperature for 1 hour

steps.title: Flood slide with 250 µL of...
steps.instruction: Flood slide with 250 µL of a 1:5000 anti-DIG alkaline phosphatase conjugated antibody in 1xBlocking buffer, place in humidity chamber and incubate at room temperature for 1 hour

steps.title: Wash 5 times in 1xMAB, 5 min per wash
steps.instruction: Wash 5 times in 1xMAB, 5 min per wash

steps.title: Flood slides with 250 µL NBT/BCIP,...
steps.instruction: Flood slides with 250 µL NBT/BCIP, incubate at room temperature until reaction develops to satisfactory levels, typically 20-30 min

steps.title: Stop reaction by flooding slides with...
steps.instruction: Stop reaction by flooding slides with diH2O, mount a slide cover with your prefered method

steps.title: For fluorescent detection use fluorescently labeled...
steps.instruction: For fluorescent detection use fluorescently labeled loop primer mixture in the standard LAMP reaction
